title: DateTime
description: A combination of date and time of day in the form `[-]CCYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss[Z|(+|-)hh:mm]`.
$comment:
This is an implementation of schema.org
[`DateTime`](https://schema.org/DateTime).

In Stencila Schema it is represented as a typed node so combined date-time
values can be validated, serialized, and attached to document metadata and
execution events. This is especially useful where timestamps need to remain
distinct from plain strings.

See also [`Date`](./date.md), [`Time`](./time.md), and
[`Timestamp`](./timestamp.md).

analogues.name: RFC 3339 date-time
analogues.notes: Close serialization analogue for full date-time strings, though Stencila models them as typed nodes.

type.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@type` keyword.

id.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@id` keyword.

value.description: The date as an ISO 8601 string.

high.description: Generate a random string of up to 20 alphanumeric characters, colons & hyphens.
